channel.title: Stockwatch - Key Events
channel.description: Real-time corporate announcements, deals, and financial results.

item.title: [ACEMEN] Ace Men Engg Works Ltd Announces Closure of Trading Window Until After Q4 Results in 2026
item.description:
Ace Men Engg Works Ltd has announced the closure of its trading window for designated persons and their immediate relatives, as per the Company's Code of Fair Disclosure of Unpublished Price Sensitive Information. The closure will begin on April 01, 2026, and will remain in effect for 48 hours after the declaration of the Financial Results for the quarter and financial year ending March 31, 2026. The date of the Board Meeting for approval of the Financial Results will be intimated in due course.

  • Ace Men Engg Works Ltd announces closure of trading window from April 01, 2026
  • Trading window to remain closed for 48 hours after Q4 and financial year ending March 31, 2026 results
  • Board Meeting date for approval of Financial Results to be announced later
  • Move aligns with the Company's Code of Fair Disclosure of Unpublished Price Sensitive Information
  • Designated persons and their immediate relatives are subject to the trading window closure

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Ace Men Engg Works Ltd | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [BKMINDST] BKM Industries Ltd. Submits Standalone and Consolidated Financial Results for Quarter & Financial Year Ended 31st March 2023
item.description:
BKM Industries Ltd. has declared its financials in accordance with the implementation of the Resolution Plan as approved by NCLT. The company, which was undergoing Corporate Insolvency Resolution Process (CIRP) under the Insolvency and Bankruptcy Code, 2016, has now finalized and submitted the financial results for the quarter and financial year ended 31st March 2023. The results have been prepared in accordance with applicable accounting standards and have been subject to Limited Review by the Statutory Auditors of the Company.

  • BKM Industries Ltd. has submitted its standalone and consolidated financial results for the quarter and financial year ended 31st March 2023.
  • The company was undergoing CIRP under the Insolvency and Bankruptcy Code, 2016, which has now been resolved.
  • The financial results have been prepared in accordance with applicable accounting standards.
  • The results have been subject to Limited Review by the Statutory Auditors of the Company.
  • This submission is made in continuation of the Resolution Plan approved by the Hon’ble NCLT and in furtherance of regularization of past compliances.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: BKM Industries Ltd | Category: Quarterly Result

item.title: [BKMINDST] BKM Industries Ltd. Submits Financial Results for Q1 2023 After Resolution Plan Implementation
item.description:
🔥 Trending

BKM Industries Ltd. has declared its financial results for the quarter and financial year ended 30th June 2023, following the implementation of the Resolution Plan approved by the National Company Law Tribunal (NCLT). The company was undergoing Corporate Insolvency Resolution Process (CIRP) under the Insolvency and Bankruptcy Code, 2016, which led to a delay in finalizing and submitting the financial results. However, with the approval of the Resolution Plan, the company has been granted appropriate reliefs and immunities for effective implementation, including relief from past non-compliances such as delay in submitting financial results.

  • BKM Industries Ltd. has submitted its Standalone and Consolidated Financial Results for Q1 and FY ended 30th June 2023.
  • The financial results have been prepared in accordance with applicable accounting standards and have been subject to Limited Review by the Statutory Auditors.
  • The company has now regularized past compliances, including the submission of financial results, as part of the Resolution Plan implementation.
  • The financial results show the company's performance after the implementation of the Resolution Plan.
  • This submission marks the completion of a significant milestone in the company's journey towards regularizing its past compliances.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: BKM Industries Ltd | Category: Quarterly Result

item.title: [SYNGENE] Syngene International Ltd. Receives Order from NFAC for AY 2016-17, Expected Refund of Rs.43,15,79,510
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Syngene International Ltd. has received an order dated February 6, 2026, giving effect to the order passed by the National Faceless Appeal Centre (NFAC) for Assessment Year (AY) 2016-17. This order follows the Writ Petition filed before the Hon’ble High Court of Karnataka and the order passed by the NFAC. The Company had filed an appeal on January 24, 2019, against disallowances and additions made in an order passed under Section 143(3) of the Act dated December 27, 2018. The NFAC has partially allowed the appeal. The Company believes there may not be a material impact on its financials, operations, or activities. However, there will be a decrease in contingent liability in relation to AY 2016-17. No penalty, restrictions, or sanctions have been imposed in the present order. The Company is in the process of analysing the order passed and will take appropriate action.

  • Syngene International Ltd. has received an order from NFAC for AY 2016-17.
  • The order is in relation to a Writ Petition filed before the Hon’ble High Court of Karnataka.
  • The NFAC has partially allowed the appeal filed by the Company for AY 2016-17.
  • The Company expects a refund of Rs.43,15,79,510 (including interest).
  • The Company believes there may not be a material impact on its financials, operations, or activities.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Syngene International Ltd | Category: Legal

item.title: [CMSINFO] CMS Info Systems Acquires FSS's Managed Services Business for ₹115 Crores
item.description:
🔥 Trending

CMS Info Systems Limited has announced the acquisition of the ATM Managed Services business of Financial Software and Systems Private Limited for a purchase consideration of up to ₹115 crores. The transaction involves the transfer of operating assets and novation of customer contracts. The acquisition is expected to close in Q1 FY27 and adds ~8,000 units and new private sector banking relationships to CMS's platform. This move aligns with CMS's publicly stated consolidation strategy and expands the depth of its three business services platforms.

  • CMS to acquire FSS's ATM Managed Services business for ₹115 crores
  • Transaction involves transfer of operating assets and novation of customer contracts
  • Expected to close in Q1 FY27
  • Adds ~8,000 units and new private sector banking relationships to CMS's platform
  • Consistent with CMS's 2030 goals and strategic lever for consolidation in ATM Management Solutions

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: CMS Info Systems Ltd | Category: Acquisitions

item.title: [BKMINDST] BKM Industries Ltd. Submits Overdue Financial Results for Q2 & FY 2022-2023 After NCLT Approved Resolution Plan Implementation
item.description:
🔥 Trending

BKM Industries Ltd. has submitted its standalone and consolidated financial results for the quarter and financial year ended 30th September 2022, following the implementation of a resolution plan approved by the National Company Law Tribunal (NCLT) under the Insolvency and Bankruptcy Code, 2016. The company, which was under Corporate Insolvency Resolution Process (CIRP), could not finalize and submit the financial results within the prescribed timelines due to the management being vested with the Resolution Professional. The submitted financial results have been prepared in accordance with applicable accounting standards and have been subject to Limited Review by the Statutory Auditors.

  • BKM Industries Ltd. submits overdue financial results for Q2 & FY 2022-2023
  • Results submitted following the implementation of a resolution plan approved by the NCLT
  • Company was under Corporate Insolvency Resolution Process (CIRP) during which management was vested with the Resolution Professional
  • Financial results prepared in accordance with applicable accounting standards and limited reviewed by Statutory Auditors
  • Submission regularizes past compliances as per the Resolution Plan approved by the NCLT

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: BKM Industries Ltd | Category: Quarterly Result

item.title: [HCG] HealthCare Global Enterprises Extends Share Acquisition Timeline for Vizag Hospital
item.description:
HealthCare Global Enterprises Ltd. has executed the Second Amendment Agreement to the Share Purchase Agreement for the acquisition of shares of Vizag Hospital and Cancer Research Centre Private Limited. The Company has also amended the Shareholders Agreement with Vizag Hospital and its continuing shareholders. The Second Closing Date, initially set for 18 months after the First Closing Date (October 02, 2024), has been extended by 3 weeks. As a result, the Company will acquire a further 34% of the equity share capital of Vizag Hospital prior to 18 months and 3 weeks after the First Closing Date.

  • HealthCare Global Enterprises Ltd. has executed the Second Amendment Agreement to the Share Purchase Agreement for the acquisition of shares of Vizag Hospital and Cancer Research Centre Private Limited.
  • The Second Closing Date for the acquisition of further 34% shares of Vizag Hospital has been extended by 3 weeks.
  • The Company will acquire the additional shares prior to 18 months and 3 weeks after the First Closing Date.
  • There are no other material changes in the SPA and SHA apart from the revised timelines.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: HealthCare Global Enterprises Ltd | Category: Acquisitions

item.title: [IFCI] IFCI Ltd Receives Order from Hon'ble NCLT in DR Regulations Matter - Exposures Under Resolution
item.description:
🔥 Trending

IFCI Ltd, a Government of India Undertaking, has received a Company Petition from the Serious Fraud Investigation Office (SFIO) on behalf of the Union of India. The Petition, filed before the Hon'ble National Company Law Tribunal (NCLT), is in connection with an investigation report dated 16.11.2022. The facilities mentioned in the investigation report were sanctioned and disbursed by IFCI Limited prior to the close of Financial Year 2016-2017. The corresponding exposures have either been resolved or are under resolution. Necessary provisioning in the loan accounts and fair value of investments has already been undertaken in accordance with applicable regulatory guidelines and Indian Accounting Standards. The net book value / carrying value of the said loans and investments as on 31st December 2025 is Rs. 157.26 crore.

  • IFCI Ltd receives Company Petition from SFIO on behalf of Union of India
  • Petition filed before Hon'ble National Company Law Tribunal (NCLT)
  • Facilities mentioned in the investigation report sanctioned and disbursed prior to Financial Year 2016-2017
  • Corresponding exposures either resolved or under resolution
  • Provisioning in loan accounts and fair value of investments undertaken as per regulatory guidelines

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: IFCI LTD. | Category: Legal

item.title: [MINDACORP] Minda Corporation Ltd Receives Assessment Order Under Section 143(3) of Income Tax Act, 1961
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Minda Corporation Ltd has received an Assessment Order under Section 143(3) of the Income Tax Act, 1961 dated March 28, 2026 from the Office of the Assistant Commissioner of Income Tax, Central Circle-13, Delhi. The order includes certain additions and disallowances to the income returned by the Company in its income tax return for Assessment Year 2023-24, resulting in a total demand of ₹670,906,417, which includes interest of ₹177,592,875. The Company is currently reviewing the Assessment Order in consultation with its tax and legal advisors and intends to contest the matter before the appropriate appellate authorities. There is no impact on financial, operation or other activities of the Company due to this Assessment Order.

  • Minda Corporation Ltd received an Assessment Order under Section 143(3) of the Income Tax Act, 1961 dated March 28, 2026.
  • The order includes certain additions and disallowances to the income returned by the Company for Assessment Year 2023-24, resulting in a total demand of ₹670,906,417.
  • The Company is reviewing the Assessment Order in consultation with its tax and legal advisors.
  • Minda Corporation Ltd intends to contest the matter before the appropriate appellate authorities.
  • There is no impact on financial, operation or other activities of the Company due to this Assessment Order.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Minda Corporation Ltd | Category: Legal

item.title: [BKMINDST] BKM Industries Ltd. Regularizes Past Compliances and Approves Key Appointments Post-CIRP
item.description:
🔥 Trending

BKM Industries Ltd. held a Board Meeting on 28th and 29th March 2026, where they considered, approved, and took note of various matters in furtherance of the Resolution Plan approved by the Hon’ble National Company Law Tribunal under the Insolvency and Bankruptcy Code, 2016. The Company has been granted reliefs/immunities for effective implementation of the Resolution Plan, regularizing past non-compliances including delay in submission of financial results. The Board approved the appointment of Ms. Priya Motwani as the Company Secretary and Compliance Officer, and the appointment of Secretarial Auditor. The Board also approved the Board’s Report and Annual Reports for the Financial Years 2020-21, 2021-22, 2022-23, 2023-24, and 2024-25. They authorized necessary actions for the recommencement of trading of the equity shares of the Company. Detailed disclosures have been submitted to the Stock Exchanges as per the SEBI (LODR) Regulations, 2015.

  • Regularization of past compliances including delay in submission of financial results
  • Appointment of Ms. Priya Motwani as the Company Secretary and Compliance Officer
  • Appointment of Secretarial Auditor
  • Approval of Board’s Report and Annual Reports for multiple financial years
  • Authorization for the recommencement of trading of the equity shares of the Company

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: BKM Industries Ltd | Category: Board Meeting
